tools.label: GitHub

capabilities.label: Search public repositories and inspect project proof
Inspect private or rate-limited repository data
Create branches, issues, or repository content

tools.use_for: Comparable projects, implementation proof, repository readiness, README quality, activity, issues, and licenses.
tools.decision: Use public access first. Keep write access outside the first ProofPilot connector release.

tools.label: YC Library and Startup School

capabilities.label: Use public founder guidance as an attributed reference

tools.use_for: Customer discovery, MVP discipline, launch, founder operations, and fundraising context.
tools.decision: Use stage-specific guidance; do not present heuristics as market evidence.

tools.label: garrytan/gstack

capabilities.label: Study founder-role and specialist workflow patterns

tools.use_for: Founder-role decomposition and specialist workflow design.
tools.decision: Keep as an attributed reference, not a runtime dependency. Verify license and revision before reusing implementation material.

tools.label: Founder Institute

capabilities.label: Use public founder and idea-validation frameworks

tools.use_for: Founder readiness, idea validation, market framing, and structured founder progression.
tools.decision: Use as a framework source, not as proof that a particular idea has demand.

tools.label: Sequoia Arc

capabilities.label: Use public PMF and company-building material

tools.use_for: Product-market fit framing, company building, and pitch readiness.
tools.decision: Use as an attributed framework source.

tools.label: First Round Review

capabilities.label: Use public operator and PMF material

tools.use_for: Early customer signals, product-market fit, hiring, and operating practices.
tools.decision: Use as secondary framework guidance with attribution.

tools.label: Andreessen Horowitz

capabilities.label: Use public company-building and operator material

tools.use_for: Company building, go-to-market, fundraising context, and domain-specific founder guidance.
tools.decision: Use as an attributed framework source, not as primary evidence of customer demand.

tools.label: 500 Global

capabilities.label: Use public founder-program and venture-education material

tools.use_for: Founder education, accelerator preparation, startup evaluation context, and global program discovery.
tools.decision: Use current regional program pages for applications and general material for coaching.

tools.label: Techstars and Startup Weekend

capabilities.label: Use public accelerator and short-cycle venture guidance

tools.use_for: Mentor-driven validation, weekend-style MVP scope, and accelerator preparation.
tools.decision: Use current program pages for applications and general material for coaching.

tools.label: Antler

capabilities.label: Use public founder and residency material

tools.use_for: Founder-market fit, team formation, and accelerator context.
tools.decision: Use current regional program pages for application requirements.

tools.label: Entrepreneur First

capabilities.label: Use public founder and company-formation material

tools.use_for: Founder edge, cofounder formation, and pre-idea accelerator preparation.
tools.decision: Use as an attributed framework and verify current cohort requirements separately.

tools.label: Devpost

capabilities.label: Inspect public events, projects, prizes, and judging criteria
Submit a project through the participant account

tools.use_for: Public project comparisons, event criteria, prize tracks, submission fields, and demo patterns.
tools.decision: Draft and review submissions; keep final submission manual and user-controlled.

tools.label: Major League Hacking

capabilities.label: Inspect public event, organizer, and participant guidance

tools.use_for: Beginner hackathon expectations, event rules, organizer patterns, and participant guidance.
tools.decision: Use current event rules for submissions and general guidance for workflow design.

tools.label: Lablab.ai

capabilities.label: Inspect public AI events and project examples

tools.use_for: AI hackathon formats, provider-driven challenges, public projects, and submission patterns.
tools.decision: Use public pages first; treat provider access as a separate capability.

tools.label: Kaggle

capabilities.label: Inspect public datasets, notebooks, and competitions
Use account-backed dataset or competition operations

tools.use_for: Datasets, notebooks, benchmarks, competitions, and reproducible ML examples.
tools.decision: Use read-only public data first and request a user token only for a named account task.

tools.label: Hugging Face

capabilities.label: Inspect public models, datasets, Spaces, and model cards
Use private or account-backed Hub resources

tools.use_for: Model and dataset discovery, licenses, benchmarks, demos, and comparable AI products.
tools.decision: Prefer public artifacts and read-only tokens.

tools.label: NASA Open APIs and Space Apps

capabilities.label: Inspect public datasets, APIs, and challenge material
Call APIs beyond demo access

tools.use_for: Open-data ideas, scientific datasets, civic and space challenges, and public API feasibility.
tools.decision: Use official challenge and dataset pages; request an API key only for execution.

tools.label: Hack Club

capabilities.label: Use public student-builder and community material

tools.use_for: Beginner-friendly project inspiration, community programs, and student builder workflows.
tools.decision: Use as community context, not as market validation.

tools.label: OpenAI

capabilities.label: Inspect current official product and API guidance
Run model inference

tools.use_for: AI architecture planning, provider comparison, model inference, and evaluation design.
tools.decision: Keep ProofPilot provider-agnostic; disclose cost and data handling before inference.

tools.label: Anthropic

capabilities.label: Inspect current official product and API guidance
Run model inference

tools.use_for: AI architecture planning, provider comparison, model inference, and evaluation design.
tools.decision: Keep ProofPilot provider-agnostic; disclose cost and data handling before inference.

tools.label: Google Gemini

capabilities.label: Inspect current official model and API guidance
Run model inference

tools.use_for: Multimodal and Gemini ecosystem planning, provider comparison, and model inference.
tools.decision: Keep ProofPilot provider-agnostic and separate AI Studio keys from cloud service identities.

tools.label: Meta Llama

capabilities.label: Inspect current official Llama model and API guidance
Run hosted model inference

tools.use_for: Open-model strategy, Llama ecosystem planning, provider comparison, and hosted inference options.
tools.decision: Separate open-weight model evaluation from hosted API access, licensing, and inference cost.

tools.label: ElevenLabs

capabilities.label: Inspect current voice and audio product guidance
Run paid voice or audio generation

tools.use_for: Voice agents, speech products, audio demos, and provider feasibility.
tools.decision: Use only for voice-specific plans and disclose consent, cost, and data risks.

tools.label: Databricks

capabilities.label: Inspect current platform and architecture guidance
Inspect an account workspace

tools.use_for: Enterprise data, ML, lakehouse, and agent or data application planning.
tools.decision: Recommend only when the data scale or sponsor context justifies the platform.

tools.label: Elastic

capabilities.label: Inspect current search, retrieval, and observability guidance
Inspect a connected deployment

tools.use_for: Search, retrieval, RAG, observability, and AI search product planning.
tools.decision: Use when search or retrieval is core to the MVP, not as default infrastructure.

tools.label: Replit

capabilities.label: Select a beginner-friendly build and deploy path
Create or deploy an account-backed project

tools.use_for: Beginner-friendly prototyping and deployment when speed matters.
tools.decision: Recommend as a manual path first; do not assume stable automation APIs.

tools.label: Bolt.new

capabilities.label: Use the hosted builder for a user-controlled prototype

tools.use_for: Fast web prototype paths for non-technical or time-constrained teams.
tools.decision: Treat as a manual user tool until a stable supported connector exists.

tools.label: Vercel

capabilities.label: Plan deployment and verify a public preview URL
Create or update a deployment

tools.use_for: Web deployment planning, public preview verification, and demo readiness.
tools.decision: Verify public URLs without credentials first; defer automated deployment.

tools.label: Supabase

capabilities.label: Plan a prototype using database, auth, storage, or realtime
Inspect or modify a connected project

tools.use_for: Fast prototype stacks using managed Postgres, auth, storage, and realtime.
tools.decision: Treat service-role credentials as high risk and keep them out of client code.

tools.label: Cloudflare

capabilities.label: Plan Workers, D1, R2, AI, and edge deployment
Create or update cloud resources

tools.use_for: Edge applications, storage, databases, AI workloads, and deployment checks.
tools.decision: Use scoped tokens per resource and defer automated resource creation.

tools.label: AWS, Bedrock, and Amplify

capabilities.label: Use current official cloud and AI architecture guidance
Inspect or create account resources

tools.use_for: Cloud architecture, sponsored tracks, enterprise workloads, and managed AI services.
tools.decision: Use only after cost, region, IAM, and resource boundaries are explicit.

tools.label: Azure and Microsoft Foundry

capabilities.label: Use current official cloud and AI architecture guidance
Inspect or create tenant resources

tools.use_for: Enterprise applications, Microsoft ecosystem tracks, cloud AI, and deployment planning.
tools.decision: Use least-privilege Entra identities and defer automated resource creation.

tools.label: Google Cloud and Firebase

capabilities.label: Use current official cloud, Firebase, and Vertex guidance
Inspect or create cloud resources

tools.use_for: Firebase prototypes, Google Cloud workloads, Vertex AI, and sponsored tracks.
tools.decision: Separate public API keys from service identities and apply cost guardrails.

tools.label: solana.new

capabilities.label: Use installed Solana journey skills, knowledge, guides, and idea data
Select a Solana starter template

tools.use_for: Solana idea discovery, ecosystem research, local source-pack routing, starter templates, and scaffold selection.
tools.decision: Discover installed local skills and data first, refresh decision-relevant claims from current official sources, and keep execution in separately gated tools.

tools.label: DefiLlama

capabilities.label: Inspect public protocol, chain, TVL, fee, and volume data
Use an installed DefiLlama research skill

tools.use_for: DeFi market health, chain and category comparison, protocol traction, and integration risk context.
tools.decision: Check current public data before recommending a DeFi integration; treat TVL as one signal rather than proof of product demand or safety.

tools.label: Colosseum Copilot

capabilities.label: Search projects, archives, clusters, and accelerator context

tools.use_for: Solana project similarity, winner patterns, archive research, gap analysis, and ecosystem context.
tools.decision: First-wave optional read connector. Use the documented read scope and honor rate and concurrency limits.

tools.label: ETHGlobal Skills

capabilities.label: Inspect public projects, events, sponsors, and prizes
Use an installed ETHGlobal research skill

tools.use_for: Ethereum hackathon project research, event requirements, sponsor tracks, and winner context.
tools.decision: Use official event pages as the authority for current rules. Treat external skill availability as optional.

tools.label: Scaffold-ETH 2

capabilities.label: Plan and scaffold an EVM application locally
Deploy contracts or publish an app

tools.use_for: EVM application scaffolding, learning, local development, and demo planning.
tools.decision: Enable local planning and scaffolding; keep deployment behind wallet and cost approval.

tools.label: Base and OnchainKit

capabilities.label: Plan Base application patterns and onchain UX
Use account-backed developer services

tools.use_for: Base application architecture, wallet UX, identity, payments, and Coinbase ecosystem integration.
tools.decision: Use guidance first; request developer credentials only for a selected integration.

tools.label: Coinbase AgentKit

capabilities.label: Inspect agentic wallet and action patterns
Execute an onchain action

tools.use_for: Future agentic wallet and onchain action workflows.
tools.decision: Keep execution deferred until external signing, policy, limits, and audit logs exist.

tools.label: Solana Agent Kit

capabilities.label: Inspect Solana agent plugins and integration patterns
Execute a Solana action

tools.use_for: Solana agent architecture, RPC, plugin, and future action workflows.
tools.decision: Use for planning only until external signing and explicit action policies exist.

tools.label: OpenZeppelin

capabilities.label: Use current contract and security guidance

tools.use_for: Smart-contract patterns, controls, upgradeability, and security readiness.
tools.decision: Enable by default for relevant EVM plans and reviews.

tools.label: Trail of Bits

capabilities.label: Use current secure-development and analysis guidance
Run approved local analysis tools

tools.use_for: Threat modeling, secure development, smart-contract analysis, and security review procedures.
tools.decision: Use relevant guidance and run local tools only when the artifact and environment permit it.

tools.label: Sui developer tools

capabilities.label: Use official Sui build and ecosystem guidance
Deploy or sign a transaction

tools.use_for: Sui architecture, Move development, local testing, and ecosystem-specific planning.
tools.decision: Use official guidance; keep signing and deployment external and gated.

tools.label: Aptos developer tools

capabilities.label: Use official Aptos build and ecosystem guidance
Deploy or sign a transaction

tools.use_for: Aptos architecture, Move development, local testing, and ecosystem-specific planning.
tools.decision: Use official guidance; keep signing and deployment external and gated.

tools.label: BNB Chain AI and MCP tools

capabilities.label: Use official BNB Chain documentation
Use a verified read-only BNB knowledge MCP
Execute a chain operation through MCP

tools.use_for: BNB Chain research, architecture, and future agent or MCP workflows.
tools.decision: Use official docs now. Require source verification before enabling a third-party MCP and keep write actions deferred.

tools.label: Avalanche developer tools

capabilities.label: Use official Avalanche build guidance
Deploy or sign a transaction

tools.use_for: Avalanche application planning, local development, and ecosystem-specific architecture.
tools.decision: Use official guidance and defer wallet or deployment actions.

tools.label: TON Blueprint and TON Connect

capabilities.label: Plan contracts, tests, and wallet connection
Request user-controlled wallet signing

tools.use_for: TON local development, contract testing, deployment planning, and wallet UX.
tools.decision: Never store a mnemonic. Use explicit external wallet signing for actions.

tools.label: Stellar developer tools

capabilities.label: Use official Stellar build guidance
Deploy or sign a transaction

tools.use_for: Stellar application planning, payments, assets, Soroban development, and ecosystem fit.
tools.decision: Use official guidance first and keep secret-key handling outside ProofPilot.

tools.label: Polkadot developer tools

capabilities.label: Use official Polkadot build and ecosystem guidance
Deploy or sign a transaction

tools.use_for: Polkadot application planning, SDK selection, interoperability, and ecosystem fit.
tools.decision: Use official documentation and treat emerging agent-specific tooling as catalogued until verified.
